nasb.text: The length of each curtain was twenty-eight cubits and the width of each curtain four cubits; all the curtains had the same measurements.

esv.text: The length of each curtain was twenty-eight cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits. All the curtains were the same size.

cnv.text: 每一幅幔子長十二公尺，每一幅幔子寬兩公尺，所有的幔子都是一樣的尺寸。

ccb.text: 每幅幔子的尺寸都一样，长十二米、宽两米。
